name: hoc/mode-toggle
description: A theme-mode toggle button HOC that switches between light, dark, and system color schemes. Composed of Button and DropdownMenu primitives, it persists the selected preference to localStorage and reacts to system preference changes. Provides an accessible toggle with icon indicators (Sun, Moon, Monitor) and is typically placed in the application header or settings panel.
useCases: Header toolbar buttons in documentation sites and dashboards for quick theme switching
Settings panels offering Light, Dark, and System preference options with persistent storage
Marketing landing pages that respect OS theme settings while allowing manual override
Accessibility-focused apps that expose high-contrast or low-light mode toggles
